resource.name: Err.DeletingStationChildren
resource.object: Can't delete children of the station

resource.name: Err.DeletingStationData
resource.object: Can't delete station. Station has data.

resource.name: CardData.AqsNgConfig
resource.object: before the IRIS stations can be configured

resource.name: CardData.DataSaved
resource.object: before the IRIS system can be saved

resource.name: CardData.Text.Single
resource.object: The following property need to be defined

resource.name: CardData.Text.Multi
resource.object: The following properties need to be defined

resource.name: Save.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save the data?

resource.name: StationPairedNoDelete.Text
resource.object: The selected station is paired with another station and\nthis pair needs to be deleted before the selected station can be deleted.

resource.name: StationsPairedNoDelete.Text
resource.object: At least one of the selected stations is paired with another station and\nthese pairs need to be deleted before the selected stations can be deleted.

resource.name: StationPairedDeleteQuestion.Text
resource.object: Pressing Yes will clear the station pairing for the selected station.

resource.name: StationsPairedDeleteQuestion.Text
resource.object: Pressing Yes will clear the station pairing for the selected stations.

resource.name: StationBackupPresentNoDelete.Text
resource.object: IRIS backups are present for the selected station.\nThese backups need to be deleted before the selected station can be deleted.

resource.name: StationsBackupPresentNoDelete.Text
resource.object: IRIS backups are present for at least one of the selected stations.\nThese backups need to be deleted before the selected stations can be deleted.

resource.name: StationsBackupPresentDeleteQuestion.Text
resource.object: Pressing Yes will delete all backups for the selected stations.

resource.name: StationBackupPresentDeleteQuestion.Text
resource.object: Pressing Yes will delete all backups for the selected station.

resource.name: AreYouSure1.Text
resource.object: Are you sure you want to delete the selected station?

resource.name: AreYouSure2.Text
resource.object: Are you sure you want to delete the selected stations?

resource.name: StationEQMChangeFailed.Text
resource.object: The EQM device cannot be changed because the new one is located in another line then the station that is paired with this selected station.\nIn order to change the EQM device, remove the pair first.

resource.name: StationEQMChangeFailed.Title
resource.object: Station EQM device change not possible

resource.name: RemoteError.Text
resource.object: No remote connection to the server.

resource.name: MessageUnpair.Text
resource.object: The station is part of a station pair and will be unpaired when saved, because the inspection side of the station changed.

resource.name: infoLabelThresholds.Text
resource.object: Circles indicate the minimum size of a defect.

resource.name: lblActiveWarning.Text
resource.object: Warning: this profile is in use

resource.name: lblActiveWarning.ToolTip
resource.object: This profile is in use on at least one IRIS station and has to be resend in order to make changes active after they are saved

resource.name: infoLabelBruises.Text
resource.object: Circles indicate the minimum size of the total area of bruises with the same color.

resource.name: lblWholeLimitsRemark.Text
resource.object: These whole limits are not used on stations that are marked as veterinarian

resource.name: NoWholeLimits
resource.object: No whole product limits for anatomic group

resource.name: Hint.Different
resource.object: Settings between TAP and Innova are different

resource.name: Save.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save data?

resource.name: Send.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to send settings for currently selected device?

resource.name: RemoteError.Text
resource.object: No remote connection to the server.

resource.name: Send.SaveConfirm
resource.object: Do you want to save the data and\nsend settings for currently selected device?

resource.name: lblClearProdNoOfShackles.Text
resource.object: Number of shackles after det/pp alarm comes up

resource.name: lblAddProdNoOfShackles.Text
resource.object: Number of shackles after det/pp alarm comes up

resource.name: chkAddProdDisable.Text
resource.object: Disable product assignment after an alarm

resource.name: barBtnConfirm.ToolTip
resource.object: Save settings on this page in the Innova database

resource.name: Send.Failed.Text
resource.object: Failed to send settings. Please check system log

resource.name: NoGroupSelected.Text
resource.object: No anatomic group selected. Select a defect first

resource.name: ColumnTooltip
resource.object: Set the priority for the anatomic group, where the first row has the highest priority and the last row the lowest priority

resource.name: ErrorMessageAspDevices
resource.object: Error occurred while collecting ASP devices Exception:

resource.name: ResultReportCreationErrorOccured
resource.object: Error. See Log for more details

resource.name: MySqlConnectionError
resource.object: Error. See log for more details

resource.name: MySqlReportRetrievalError
resource.object: Error. See log for more details

resource.name: MySqlImageRetrievalError
resource.object: Error. See log for more details

resource.name: MySqlPartDataRetrievalError
resource.object: Error. See log for more details

resource.name: UpdateCacheFailure
resource.object: Error. See log for more details

resource.name: DataCategorizationReportRetrievalFailure
resource.object: Error. See log for more details

resource.name: DataCategorizationFailure
resource.object: Error. See log for more details

resource.name: Send.Profile.No.Profile.Text
resource.object: There is not a profile selected for IRIS station {0}

resource.name: HintProfile.NotInDevice
resource.object: Profile configuration not in TAP. Send Profile

resource.name: HintProfile.Different
resource.object: Profile configuration between TAP and Innova differs. Send profile

resource.name: Save.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save data?

resource.name: RemoteError.Text
resource.object: No remote connection to the server.

resource.name: Send.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to send profile '{0}' to '{1}' ?

resource.name: Send.Failed.Text
resource.object: Failed to send profile. Please check system log.

resource.name: btnSetReferenceImage.Hint
resource.object: Sets the current selected image as reference image in profile management

resource.name: Send.IrisCleanup
resource.object: Successfully send the IRIS database cleanup message to TAP

resource.name: Send.Failed.IrisCleanup
resource.object: Failed to send the IRIS database cleanup message to TAP

resource.name: ResultReportCreationErrorOccured
resource.object: An exception occured while retrieving requested data. See Log for more details

resource.name: MySqlConnectionError
resource.object: Creating a MySql network connection to IRIS {0} failed. See log for more details

resource.name: MySqlReportRetrievalError
resource.object: Retrieving report data from IRIS {0} failed. See log for more details

resource.name: MySqlImageRetrievalError
resource.object: Error occured while retrieving image data from IRIS {0}. See log for more details

resource.name: MySqlPartDataRetrievalError
resource.object: Retrieving anatomic part data from IRIS {0} failed. See log for more details

resource.name: UpdateCacheFailure
resource.object: Updating the cache with new data from IRIS {0} failed. See log for more details

resource.name: VqmStationNotPresent
resource.object: IRIS Station not present in server application. Is the right license installed?

resource.name: DataCategorizationReportRetrievalFailure
resource.object: Data categorization and registration failed due to an error in IRIS reports retrieval. See log for more details

resource.name: DataCategorizationFailure
resource.object: Data categorization and registration failed. See log for more details

resource.name: IrisBackupFailed
resource.object: IRIS backup failed. See log for more details.

resource.name: IrisRestoreFailed
resource.object: Restoring the IRIS backup failed. See log for more details.

resource.name: colTapIrisConnection.ToolTip
resource.object: Indicates the connection state between the TAP system and the IRIS controller

resource.name: colTapState.ToolTip
resource.object: Indicates the connection state between the TAP system and Innova

resource.name: colProfileState.ToolTip
resource.object: Indicates if the selected profile state is up to date in the IRIS controller

resource.name: btnSend.Hint
resource.object: Send profile settings of the selected station to the station\'s TAP device

resource.name: btnRefresh.Hint
resource.object: Read data for the whole form

resource.name: Vqm.SettingsStatus.NotInDevice
resource.object: Settings not in TAP. Send TAP settings

resource.name: Vqm.SettingsStatus.Different.Reset
resource.object: Settings between TAP and Innova are different. Reset TAP System

resource.name: Vqm.SettingsStatus.Different.Download
resource.object: Settings between TAP and Innova are different. Send TAP settings

resource.name: Pds.ProcessInfo.Flock0
resource.object: No images available for products in flock 0

resource.name: btnUnfavorite.ToolTip
resource.object: Remove product report and image from favorites

resource.name: btnFavorite.ToolTip
resource.object: Add product report and image to favorites

resource.name: RefImageSaveFailed.Text
resource.object: Failed to save the reference image

resource.name: RefImageSaveNotPossible.Text
resource.object: The reference image can not be saved, because no image for selected station is shown in the decision view.

resource.name: RefImagesSaveNotPossible.Text
resource.object: The reference images can not be saved, because the images from combined station are not all shown in the decision view.

resource.name: RefImageSaveNoPossibleForFav.Text
resource.object: Favorites can not be saved as reference. Part location reports are not available for favorites.

resource.name: FailedExportNoFrontBack
resource.object: No frontside and backside image could be found

resource.name: FailedExportNoBack
resource.object: No backside image could be found

resource.name: FailedExportNoFront
resource.object: No frontside image could be found

resource.name: ClearToDefaultsPostMessage
resource.object:
Remember to execute actions described below

- Assign ASP's handling AQS qualities (tab 'Trajects')
- Reassign qualities for each ASP handling AQS qualities (in PDS-NT Recipe manager)
- Reset TAP system. (Only necessary when AQS devices were present in the equipment configuration).
- Restart Innova IRIS server program(s).
- Redefine all data collection categories in the system setup.

resource.name: PDSNTDefinitionsDeletedProgress
resource.object: Please wait while definitions are deleted in PDSNT database

resource.name: InnovaDefinitionsDeletedProgress
resource.object: Please wait while definitions are deleted in Innova database

resource.name: DefaultCreationProgress
resource.object: Please wait while default definitions are created

resource.name: CategoryDeletedProgress
resource.object: Please wait while data collection categories are deleted

resource.name: lblTapResetRequired.Text
resource.object: Changes on this page require a TAP reset

resource.name: MaxNoOfDefectsReached
resource.object: Maximum number of defects has been reached

resource.name: ItemNotReadyForMoveText
resource.object: The new definition must be completed before it can be moved.

resource.name: MoveNotPossibleText
resource.object: Only bruise and feather definitions can be moved.

resource.name: DeleteNotPossibleText
resource.object: Only bruise and feather definitions can be deleted.

resource.name: lblTapResetRequired.Text
resource.object: Changes on this page require a TAP reset

resource.name: chkAgree.Properties.Caption
resource.object: I have read and agree with these actions.

resource.name: lblWarning.Text
resource.object:
This action will delete all current related AQS definitions in the PDSNT database. This includes all AQS definitions, AQS devices and all registered AQS production data.

This action will delete all current related Iris definitions in the Innova database. This includes all Iris definitions and profiles.

Before this action you should:
- Close all running PDSNT applications.

After this action you will need to:
- Assign ASP's handling AQS qualities (tab 'Trajects')
- Reassign qualities for each ASP handling AQS qualities (in PDS-NT Recipe manager)
- Reset TAP system. (Only necessary when AQS devices were present in the equipment configuration).
- Restart Innova IRIS server program(s).
- Redefine all data collection categories in the system setup.

resource.name: VQMRelationError
resource.object: The following IRIS defect(s) do not have a related PDSNT defect:\n{0}

resource.name: SaveChanges
resource.object: Do you want to save the changes in the profile configuration?

resource.name: tabPageThresholds.ToolTip
resource.object: Limit values of various defects for the selected profile

resource.name: tabPageFeatherLimits.ToolTip
resource.object: Feather limit values for the selected profile

resource.name: tabPageBruiseLimits.ToolTip
resource.object: Bruise limit for the selected profile

resource.name: tabPageWholeLimits.ToolTip
resource.object: Limit values of whole product defects for the selected profile

resource.name: tabPageShapeLimits.ToolTip
resource.object: Limit values of shape defects for the selected profile

resource.name: SaveProfilesQuestion
resource.object: Do you want to save the changes made in the previous selected profile? \nSelecting "no" will reset the changes made!

resource.name: NoSelectedProfileNameText
resource.object: The name of the current selected profile should be filled in and should by unique.

resource.name: ResendProfileWarningText
resource.object: Please send changed profiles to the TAP system(s) in order to make the changes active.

resource.name: FailureSavingProfileLimitsCaption
resource.object: A error occured while saving the profile limits

resource.name: colActive.ToolTip
resource.object: Combined state of the profile in all stations that are configured with it.

resource.name: NoValidProfileNameText
resource.object: The name of the current selected profile should be filled in and unique.

resource.name: DuplicateProfileNameText
resource.object: Failed to update the name of the profile. The new name is already in use.

resource.name: RemoveProfileQuestion
resource.object: Are you sure you want to remove the selected profile?

resource.name: DeleteProfileErrorText
resource.object: Active profiles can not be deleted.

resource.name: DeleteRegistrationProfileErrorText
resource.object: Registration profile can not be deleted.

resource.name: SendInactiveProfileErrorText
resource.object: Inactive profiles can not be send

resource.name: SendProfileQuestionText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to send the selected profile to all stations that are using it?

resource.name: SendSuccessText
resource.object: All stations using the selected profile were successfully updated with the new profile.

resource.name: FailureSavingProfileLimits
resource.object: A error occured while saving the profile limits, check the limits!

resource.name: SaveChangesDeletExistingRegs.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save the content changes in the selected category?\n\nChoosing Yes will also delete the existing count registrations for this category.

resource.name: SaveChangesWarningExistingRegs.Text
resource.object: Saving the changes will also delete existing count registrations for this category.\n\nSave changes?

resource.name: SaveChanges.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save the category content changes in the selected category?

resource.name: but they may not have
resource.object: but these products may not have

resource.name: and they must also have
resource.object: and these products must also have

resource.name: btnAdd.ToolTip
resource.object: Add selected stations to the station pairs table

resource.name: VQMStationRelationError
resource.object: Selected stations have different profiles. Pairing is not possible.

resource.name: VQMStationLineRelationError
resource.object: Selected stations are located in different lines. Pairing these stations isn't possible.

resource.name: Restore.Success.Text
resource.object: A backup was successfully restored to IRIS.\n\nPlease reset the IRIS in order to get the restored backup up and running

resource.name: Backup.DirectoryExists.Text
resource.object: A folder with the name "{0}" already exists.\nThe content of this folder will be cleared before the backup is created. Do you want to continue?

resource.name: Backup.New.Text
resource.object: There is a maximum of 6 backups. Please remove one or more backups first.

resource.name: Backup.StationNotActive.Text
resource.object: Backup is not possible because IRIS station is not active.

resource.name: Restore.StationNotActive.Text
resource.object: Restore is not possible because IRIS station is not active.

resource.name: Backup.Delete.Text
resource.object: Do you want to delete backup:

resource.name: IrisBackupFailed
resource.object: IRIS backup failed. See log for more details.

resource.name: IrisRestoreFailed
resource.object: Restoring the IRIS backup failed. See log for more details.

resource.name: Import.InvalidPath.Text
resource.object: The selected folder doesn't seem to contain a valid IRIS backup.\nImport is not possible.
Base table not allowed. Base tables already activated.
Parsing not allowed in current device state
Invalid order of IDs in table
